The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Need ambulance.[18:03:44 GMT-07:00 21 Mar 2026] (281) 932-1363: This Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received.
